sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15079" key="a)rista/fulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀριστάφῠλος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰρ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">στᾰφυλή</etym>) <sense id="n15079.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rich in grapes,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.580</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
